    zgenom

  • zsh-quickstart-kitstars382 - A simple quickstart for using ZSH with zgenomstars48. This includes a curated collection of plugins, automatically configures ZSH to use zgenomstars48 to load them and periodically automatically update itself, the plugins, and the quickstart kit itself.

item.title: unixorn/awesome-zsh-plugins Mar 14th, 2021
item.description:
Frameworks

Zinit

  • Turbo mode – 80% faster Zsh startup! for example: instead of 200 ms, it'll be 40 ms,
  • annexes (↔ Zinit extensions),
  • bindkey capturing and remapping,
  • clean fpath (the array $fpath is not being used to add completions and autoload functions, hence it stays concise, not bloated),
  • also, in general: all the mechanisms from the Zsh Plugin Standard – Zinit is a reference implementation of the standard.

    • Plugins

  • bolstars1 - Prints a random quote when you open a terminal window.

item.title: unixorn/awesome-zsh-plugins Nov 15th, 2020
item.description:
Plugins

  • colored-man-pages-modstars8 - Forked from ohmyzsh/ohmyzsh/plugins/colored-man-pages. Colorizes man output.
  • npm (igoradamenko)stars4 - Add npm aliases & command completion. Based on the Oh-My-Zsh npm plugin.
  • npm (trystan2k)stars0 - Adds npm aliases. Based on the Oh-My-Zsh npm plugin.
  • favstars2 - ZSH/fzfstars36.6k plugin that makes it really easy to add and recall named favorites of your important directories.

    • Themes

  • aflah-bharistars0 - Modified version of the robbyrussell theme in oh-my-zsh.
  • agitnosterstars4 - Based on agnoster theme included in Oh My Zshstars127.5k and bash-git-promptstars6k. Shows detailed information about git status.
  • alpharizedstars12 - Optimized to work with solarized dark terminals. It's a modified version of the avit theme.
  • araelstars0 - Fork of gallifrey.
  • archiestars1 - Arch Linux inspired ZSH theme. Based on the norm theme.
  • asqstars0 - Based on theunraveler.
  • astro - Based on the ys and robbyrussell themes.
  • avit-d2kstars15 - Based on the oh-my-zsh avit theme, with small changes.
  • avit-modstars0 - Modified version of oh-my-zsh's avit theme.
  • beerstars1 - Inspired by cloud, but with beer icons.
  • biradatestars1 - Based on the bira theme, but displays the date instead of the username in the prompt.
  • biramestars2 - Based on bira.
  • birav2stars0 - Based on bira. Includes git, rvm and virtualenv status decorations.
  • blinks-xfanstars2 - Based on the existing theme blinks.
  • blokkzhstars4 - Theme based on oh-my-zsh's built in gnzh theme. Requires a font with unicode support.
  • bougenvillestars0 - Variant of dallas.
  • bryce-robbyrussellstars0 - Inspired by the powerlinestars2.9k and robbyrussell themes.
  • czshstars2 - ZSH with oh-my-zshstars127.5k and the agnosterstars3.1k theme in a container.
  • diy-ysstars0 - Variant of ys without hostname or time.
  • dustmodstars2 - Derived from the dst theme in oh-my-zsh.
  • emojeerstars0 - Emoji flavored oh-my-zsh theme.
  • fishy-litestars2 - Fork of the original fishy theme in oh-my-zsh with much of the extraneous stuff cut out to improve load speeds. Includes a battery gauge and git status display that can be enabled on the right-hand side of the prompt.
  • fishy2stars2 - ZSH theme inspired by original fishy.
  • frisk-arrowstars0 - A theme based on the frisk oh-my-zsh-theme.
  • frisk-red - Red version of the frisk theme from oh-my-zsh.
  • furiostars17 - Fork of the Cloud oh-my-zsh theme. with different colors and emojis.
  • gideonstars0 - Inspired by avit, includes git decorations, IP address, host and path.
  • gnrnzhstars0 - Customization of gnzh.zsh-theme from oh-my-zsh.
  • hedroed-bureaustars0 - Based on bureau, with added git status decorations and npm status.
  • icestars1 - Very lightly modified bureaustars22 theme combined with bira.
  • intheloop-powerlinestars1 - An extension of the intheloop theme to use powerline fonts.
  • lambda (cdimascio)stars41 - Inspired by the robbyrussell lambda theme. Includes git status decorations.
  • leveragestars0 - Based on minimal, uses colors, and an extra ¬ character, to better distinguish the command line prompt from your output.
  • lilithstars0 - Modification of gallifrey and hyperzshstars472.
  • limpidestars0 - Modified version of miloshadzic theme which displays parent and current directory.
  • lukestars0 - Includes git decorations. Based on the frisk oh-my-zsh theme.
  • modernostars1 - A simple and modern ZSH theme inspired by the robbyrussell theme from Oh-My-ZSH. Includes git status decorations.
  • neewbiestars0 - Minimal theme with git decorations. Based on robbyrussell.
  • phalanxstars0 - Minimal theme in the spirit of the robbyrussell and Pure Shell themes.
  • planetstars0 - A slimmed down version of steef from oh-my-zshstars127.5k.
  • powerlevel9kstars13.1k - Powerlevel9k is a theme for ZSH which uses Powerline Fontsstars21.6k. It can be used with vanilla ZSH or ZSH frameworks such as Oh-My-Zshstars127.5k, Preztostars12.1k, Antigenstars6.5k, and many others.
  • robbyolivierstars1 - Based on ideas from the the robbyrussell theme and the project zsh-git-promptstars1.5k.
  • seppukustars1 - Clean and minimal theme inspired by cloud.
  • short-ysstars0 - Based on the ys theme. Includes git and hg status decorations.
  • small-terminal-diystars0 - A variant of the ys theme in oh-my-zshstars127.5k.
  • steef (zimfw)stars2 - A customizable version of steeef's theme.
  • sunrise-rubystars0 - Similar to sunrise but includes the active Ruby version.
  • superkolostars1 - Add date and return status to the kolo theme.
  • systars2 - Based on ys, includes git status decorations.
  • the-time-lordstars0 - A theme based on gallifrey.
  • wadestars4 - Mashup of the popular ZSH themes Agnoster and Fishy, with some visual tweaks.
  • yairshefistars0 - Minimal theme with line separated prompts. Based on the robbyrussell theme.
  • yz50stars0 - Colorful, based off of robbyrussell and crunch themes. Includes git status decorations.
  • zemm-blinksstars7 - Customized version of oh-my-zsh blinks with mercurial support and other changes.
  • zqtstars2 - Modified version of oh-my-zsh's maran theme.

Frameworks

item.title: unixorn/awesome-zsh-plugins Sep 22nd, 2020
item.description:
Frameworks

Zinit

  • packages,
  • services ↔ a single-instance, background plugins,

    • Frameworks

    znap

  • Make any prompt appear instantly. Reduce your startup time from ~200ms to ~40ms with just one command.
  • Asynchronously compile your plugins and functions.
  • Cache those expensive eval $(commands).
  • Clone or pull multiple repos in parallel.
  • Re-clone all your repos without you having to re-enter them.

item.title: unixorn/awesome-zsh-plugins Sep 18th, 2020
item.description:
Themes

  • agnoster - Optimized for solarized terminal color schemes, shows git decorations, user@host, working directory, the previous command's exit status and whether you are running with root privileges. Requires a Powerline-compatible font.
  • clean (akz92)stars7 - Minimalist ZSH theme.
  • dr4kk0nnys_v2stars0 - Works well on dark backgrounds, includes git status decorations.
  • fdT2Kstars0- Based on agnosterstars3.1k, preset to include virtualenv, last command status, nvm, docker machine and git, hg and bzr status decorations.
  • geometrystars778 - A minimal ZSH theme where any function can be added to the left prompt or (async) right prompt on the fly.
  • iGeekstars0 - Modified iGeek theme. Works with macOS out-of the box, includes git status decorations.
  • jhleeemestars2 - Includes git and python virtualenv status decorations, user, pwd,time and system name.
  • minimal-improvedstars14 - Theme for dark terminals, includes git decorations in the right-side prompt.
  • minimal2stars10 - A minimal and extensible ZSH theme. Forked from subnixr's originalstars219 and adapted for Zimfwstars2k.
  • seti_UXstars1 - A simple omz-compatible theme with a corresponding iTerm 2 color scheme.
  • solarized-powerline (houjunchen)stars10 - Solarized powerline-style theme for ZSH.
  • thetastars9 - Includes git and hg status decorations. Also has java, python, ruby, node, go and elixir version information.

    • Plugins

  • abbr-pathstars6 - Adds functionality of the theme_title_use_abbreviated_path parameter from some oh-my-fish themes.
  • artisanstars111 - Laravel artisan plugin for ZSH to help you to run artisan from anywhere in the project tree, with tab completion!
  • expandstars5 - Expands regular aliases, global aliases, incorrect spellings and phrases, globs, history expansion and $parameters with the spacebar key.
  • firebase (rmrs)stars5 - Add an indicator in the prompt that you're in a directory with a firebase.json file (aka "firebase project").
  • fzf-widgetsstars75 - Adds some ZLE widgets for fzfstars36.6k.
  • gitstars14 - Replacement for the stock oh-my-zsh git plugin. Provides quite a few useful aliases and functions. The motivation to replace the default plugin stems from the fact that it comes with some inconsistencies that make a few popular commands rather unintuitive, so this plugin makes the aliases consistent.
  • goenv (bbenne10)stars5 - Manage $GOPATH similarly to Python's virtualenvwrapper.
  • hubstars9 - ZSH plugin for forking model.
  • jvmstars4 - Allows selection of JDK on macOS.
  • rbenv (jsahlen)stars0 - Variant based on the original oh-my-zsh rbenv plugin.
  • ztracestars13 - Catches output of commands, allows to reuse that output, glue it with history content.
  • zuistars99 - ZSH User Interface library – CGI+DHTML-like rapid TUI application development with ZSH.

item.title: unixorn/awesome-zsh-plugins Aug 3rd, 2020
item.description:
Tutorials

ZSH on Windows

  • superconsolestars30 - Windows-only.

    • ConEmu/zsh out-of-the-box configured to restore previously opened tabs and shell working directories after ConEmu restart
    • Choose between clean and inherited environment when starting new SuperConsole sessions
    • Custom colorful scheme, colorful output for various commands
    • MSYS2 included, zsh and necessary software preinstalled, uses zsh-grml-config
    • Uses Antigen for ZSH theme and config management
    • Enabled number of ZSH plugins to activate completion, highlighting and history for most comfortable use
    • Git-for-Windows repo with proper git and git lfs support for MSYS2 environment is configured, git client already installed.
    • ssh-agent for git works out-of-box, add your keys to ConEmu/msys64/ConEmu/msys64/home/user/.ssh dir
    • Non-blocking ZSH prompt status updates thanks to agkozak-zsh-prompt
    • Customized for MSYS2 command-not-found handler suggests what package to install
    • Sets up nano as main editor, enables nano syntax highlighting
    • Custom helper scripts added to ConEmu/msys64/3rdparty

item.title: unixorn/awesome-zsh-plugins Jul 24th, 2020
item.description:
Plugins

  • z-a-bin-gem-nodestars8 - Zinitstars2.2k extension that exposes binaries without altering $PATH, installs Ruby gems and Node modules and easily exposes their binaries, and updates the gems and modules when the associated plugin or snippet is updated.
  • z-a-manstars14 - Zinitstars2.2k extension that generates man pages for all plugins and snippets.
  • z-a-meta-pluginsstars14 - Install groups of plugins with a single label (Zinitstars2.2k only).
  • z-a-patch-dlstars5 - Zinitstars2.2k extension that downloads files and applies patches through the provided dl'' and patch'' ices.
  • z-a-ruststars17 - Zinitstars2.2k extension that that installs rust and cargo packages inside plugin directories.
  • z-a-submodsstars6 - Zinitstars2.2k extenstion allows installing and managing additional submodules within a plugin or snippet.
  • z-a-teststars3 - Zinitstars2.2k extension that runs tests (via make test, for example) – if it finds any of them – after installing and updating a plugin or snippet.
  • z-a-unscopestars6 - Allows installing plugins for Zinitstars2.2k without specifying the user name by querying the Github API.
  • terraform (macunha1)stars4 - Add convenience aliases for terraform, tab completions and helper function to add your terraform workspace in the prompt.

item.title: unixorn/awesome-zsh-plugins Jun 27th, 2020
item.description:
Themes

  • endless-dogstars3 - oh-my-zsh-compatible theme that mimics grml-zsh-config.
  • gentoostars1 - Breaks out the oh-my-zsh gentoo theme into a separate repo for non-omz users.
  • geometryHostInfostars1 - Adds host info to the geometrystars778 theme.
  • helbstars0 - Loosely based on Gentoo's old bash theme. Includes git information, return value of last command, and uses different username color and prompt char for users ($) and root (#).
  • lagunestars1 - A minimal ZSH theme.
  • mouxstars1 - Works well with a dark terminal background, includes git decorations in RPROMPT.
  • myzshstars0 - Maxime Garcia's myzsh theme.
  • nodestars62 - oh-my-zsh's node theme, broken out to make it easier to use with other plugin managers.
  • nt9stars27 - A clean, distraction free and git focused development theme. Shows path relative to git root (or ~ when outside git repo), time since last commit, current SHA, branch and branch state.
  • nuqlezshstars1 - A simple theme for prezto and oh-my-zsh.
  • powerline (syui)stars0 - A git aware powerline theme.
  • puritystars14 - Inspired by robbyrussell theme and the purestars10.2k prompt.
  • ramielstars0 - Fork of the nodestars62.
  • saraivastars4 - Includes git status decorations, works well on a dark terminal background.
  • schminitz-v2stars0 - Shows git status decorations, user@host information, the exit status of last command, and whether running as root.
  • schminitz - Shows if vim is running in the background when using :sh command.
  • seltzerstars0 - Inspired by the dieter theme, uses color-coding to provide information.
  • senpaistars10 - Clean prompt theme for Devops. Includes git status information, the kubernetes context, AWS profile, GCP project and Azure active cloud.

item.title: unixorn/awesome-zsh-plugins Jun 26th, 2020
item.description:
Plugins

  • command-not-foundstars18 - A mirror of the oh-my-zsh command-not-found plugin so you don't have to include all of oh-my-zsh.
  • direnvstars2 - A plugin for installing and loading direnvstars7.4k. Inspired by zsh-pyenvstars15.
  • dwimstars79 - Attempts to predict what you will want to do next. It provides a key binding (control-u) that will replace the current (or previous) command line with the command you will want to run next.
  • fzf-fasdstars43 - Integrates fzfstars36.6k and fasdstars5.4k --- tab completion of z with fzf's fuzzy search!
  • git-complete-urlsstars0 - Enhance git completion to include in the remotes completion (e.g. from git clone) any URL in the clipboard.
  • gvm (dgnest)stars4 - A gvm (Go version manager) plugin for ZSH.
  • history-popupstars0 - Captures the PageUp key and uses dialog to open a popup menu with the history, so the user can interactively navigate through it and pick the history line to bring back to the prompt.
  • history-search-multi-wordstars325 - A syntax highlighted, multi-word history searcher for ZSH, bound to Ctrl-R, with advanced functions (e.g. bump of history entry to top of history).
  • homeassistant-clistars2 - Provides completion and (configuration) helpers for the Home Assistant Command-line interface (hass-cli)stars255. and allows command line interaction with Home Assistant instances.
  • ingstars2 - Streamlined ping output.
  • ipipstars13 - Plugin for IPIP.
  • jdk-switchstars4 - A macOS-only plugin for switching between jdk versions.
  • npmsstars5 - Utility powered by fzf for using npm scripts interactively. Requires fzfstars36.6k and jq.
  • nvm-auto-usestars14 - Calls nvm use automatically whenever you enter a directory that contains an .nvmrc file with a string telling nvm which node to use.
  • oathstars5 - Manages 2FA authentication 6 digit tokens. It was highly inspired by this article about using oathtool for 2 step verification.
  • q (cal2195)stars46 - Add vim-like macro registers to your ZSH shell.
  • razer-status-codestars3 - Change the colour of your Razer Mouse based on the status of the last executed command. Requires OpenRazer linux drivers.
  • tab-titlestars9 - Set the terminal tab title according to current directory or running process. Forked from termsupport.zsh
  • vagrant-box-wrapperstars1 - A wrapper plugin for vagrant that allows for calling vagrant commands from outside of the box directory. The plugin also ships with a few extra commands that help to manage more than one box, along with custom tab-completion.
  • viexchangestars8 - A vi mode plugin for easily swapping text between two places in the buffer, like vim-exchange.
  • zinit-consolestars20 – A semigraphical (curses) consolette for zinit plugin manager.

item.description:
Frameworks

Zinit

  • plugin unloading (allows e.g.: dynamic theme switching),

    • Tutorials

    Zinit (née zplugin)

  • zinit-configsstars144 - Real-world configuration files (basically a collection of .zshrc files) holding Zinit invocations.

    • Plugins

  • command-timestars122 - Show execution time for long commands in ZSH and powerlevel9kstars13.1k. Similar to REPORTTIME builtin, but only outputs when user + system time >= REPORTTIME.
  • nodenv (jsahlen)stars4 - Auto-load nodenv and its completions into the shell.
  • toggle-command-prefixstars11 - Add a widget to toggle a prefix to a command. Binds Alt+s to prefix a command with sudo by default.
  • vi-incrementstars4 - Add vim-like increment/decrement operations.
  • vi-motionsstars17 - Add new motions and text objects including quoted/bracketed text and commands.
  • vi-quotestars2 - Add an operation which quotes or unquotes a motion.

item.description:
Plugins

  • antigen-git-rebasestars6 - Antigen/ZSH script to aid with git rebasing.

  • markeditstars4 - Mark files and edit them with autocompletion for existing marks.

  • pgstars17 - Adds utility functions to work with PostgreSQL.
  • sys-diverstars6 - A ZSH plugin for directory change or editor startup with only key operations using widgets without typing commands.
  • undollarstars7 - Strips the dollar sign from the beginning of the terminal prompt.
  • vim-modestars185 - Friendly vi-mode bindings, adding basic Emacs keys, incremental search, mode indicators and more.
  • vimmanstars17 - View vim plugin manuals (help) like man in ZSH.
  • vimtostars28 - Improved ZSH vi mode (bindkey -v) plugin.

  • abbrev-aliasstars87 - Provides functionality similar to vim's abbreviation expansion.
  • almostontopstars74 - Clears previous command output every time before new command executed in shell. Inspired by the alwaysontopstars173 plugin for bash.

item.title: unixorn/awesome-zsh-plugins Nov 11th, 2018
item.description:
Plugins

  • zgen-compinit-tweakstars3 - Make compinit run only once after all loading is done by zgenstars1.3k.
  • 256colorstars107 - Enhances the terminal environment with 256 colors. It looks at the chosen TERM environment variable and sees if there is respective ncurses' terminfo with 256 colors available. The result is a multicolor terminal, if available.
  • autoenv-extendedstars135 - Extended version of the zsh-autoenvstars525 plugin.
  • autoenvstars525 - If a directory contains a .env file, it will automatically be executed when you cd into it.
  • autojumpstars12.6k - A cd command that learns - easily navigate directories from the command line. Install autojump-zsh for best results.
  • autoupdate-antigenstars23 - Antigen doesn't do automatic updates like oh-my-zsh. This plugin adds auto updating for antigen, both of antigen and the bundles loaded in your configuration.
  • aws-uploadstars0 - Boost your productivity with aws-upload.
  • branch-managerstars11 - A plugin for managing git branches.
  • cd-gitrootstars55 - A ZSH plugin to cd to the git repository root directory.
  • cd-reminderstars9 - Display reminders when cd-ing into specified directories.
  • colored-man-pagesstars31 - Colorize man pages.
  • flow-pluginstars44 - This plugin makes the flow command available inside every subdirectory of the TYPO3 Flow distribution.
  • fzf-marksstars351 - Little script to create, navigate and delete bookmarks in bash and zsh, using the fuzzy finder fzfstars36.6k.
  • git-add-remotestars14 - Easily add the upstream remote to your git fork.
  • git-aliases.zshstars57 - Creates a lot of useful aliases for combinations of commonly used git commands.
  • git-extra-commandsstars644 - Extra git helper scripts packaged as a plugin.
  • git-pluginstars3 - Adds some functions for git.
  • git-prompt-useremailstars4 - Adds prompt reminders for git user.email.
  • git-secretstars2.4k - A bash-tool to store your private data inside a git repository.
  • git-syncstars41 - A ZSH plugin to sync git repositories and clean them up.
  • grep2awkstars20 - ZLE widget to transform grep command into awk command.
  • grunt-pluginstars7 - Add autocompletion for grunt.
  • gvm (yerinle)stars1 - Provides autocompletion for gvm (Groovy enVironment Manager).
  • history-syncstars143 - An Oh My Zsh plugin for GPG encrypted, Internet synchronized ZSH history using git.
  • hub-ci-zsh-pluginstars0 - A simple plugin for adding hub ci-status to your ZSH theme.
  • kill-nodestars6 - ZSH plugin for murdering node process families.
  • lesaint-gitstars0 - Replacement git plugin for Oh-My-Zsh-compatible frameworks.
  • nodestars6 - Srijan Shetty's nodejs plugin for ZSH with caching of nvm completions and autoloading of nvm if present.
  • nvmstars1.5k - ZSH plugin for installing, updating and loading nvm.
  • opera-git-pluginstars0 - git aliases.
  • pyenv-lazy-loadstars3 - Plugin for lazy-loading pyenv in ZSH.
  • pyenv-lazystars26 - Lazy load pyenv. The initial eval "$(pyenv init -)" is executed the first time pyenv is called.
  • schrootstars0 - Show current chroot name in your prompt.
  • sensei-gitstars3 - Adds many git aliases and helper shell functions.
  • sudostars16 - The sudo plugin from oh-my-zsh, extracted to a standalone. Toggles sudo before the current/previous command by pressing ESC-ESC in emacs-mode or vi-command mode.
  • tipzstars24 - Displays your alias if you have an alias for the command you just ran, similarly to alias-tipsstars485.
  • tmux-zsh-vim-titlesstars20 - Create unified terminal titles for tmux, ZSH, and Vim/NVIM, modular.
  • zconveystars51 - Adds ability to send commands to other ZSH sessions, you can use this to cd $PWD on all active Z shell sessions, for example.
  • zedstars6 - A simple wrapper for zstars13.1k to install it via a ZSH plugin.
  • appupstars9 - Adds start, stop, up and down commands when it detects a docker-compose.yml or Vagrantfile in the current directory (e.g. your application). Just run up and get coding!

    • Fonts

  • Fantasque-sansstars5.5k - Another Powerline-compatible font.

    • Themes

  • cobalt2gitstars1 - Cobalt 2 theme with git extensions.
  • hanpenstars0 - Shows git branch and status, last command exit code, last command execution time if more than ZSH_THEME_HANPEN_CMD_MAX_EXEC_TIME.
  • kinda-fishystars5 - Based on Fishy theme, but shows full paths instead of abbreviated directories and only shows user@machine in ssh sessions and docker containers.
  • multilinestars16 - Powerline-esque theme based on agnosterstars3.1k.
  • nknustars0 - A simple oh-my-zsh theme.
  • predawn-shellstars48 - Theme optimized for dark terminal themes.
  • random-emoji-robbyrussellstars1 - Based on random-emoji and robbyrussell themes.

    • Completions

  • antibody-completionstars0 - This plugin provides completion for Antibodystars1.6k plugin manager.
  • ctop - Tab completions for ctopstars11.5k.
  • kafkastars31 - Completions for Apache kafka.
  • kompose - Add tab completions for Kompose.
  • kubeadm - Add tab completions for kubeadm.

item.title: unixorn/awesome-zsh-plugins Oct 14th, 2018
item.description:
Plugins

  • voxstars8 - An oh-my-zsh plugin to control VOX, a lightweight full-featured audio player for macOS that can play a variety of formats including FLAC and Ogg Vorbis.
  • crystalstars28 - A plugin for Crystalstars16.4k.
  • fixnumpad-osx - Enables numpad keys of Apple keyboards to be recognized in ZSH.
  • jhipsterstars33 - Adds commands for jHipster.
  • macosstars2 - A ZSH plugin for macOS.
  • mylocationstars6 - A plugin to show your current location based on your IP address.
  • plugin-ibtoolstars1 - Adds ibtool shortcuts to generate localized XIB files.
  • pluginstars9 - Creates custom oh-my-zsh plugins from a boilerplate template. Very oh-my-zsh centric, the generated plugins will need editing to work with other frameworks.
  • terminal-appstars13 - A plugin for integrating with the new El Capitan Terminal.app features.
  • velocitystars2 - Powerline-based theme elements for ZSH and tmux.
  • venv-litestars4 - A super-lightweight sort-of-clone of virtualenvwrapper; it pretty much expects you to be using pyenvstars23.3k (though you don't have to), and because it's based on the venv module, (creation) only works for python >= 3.3.

    • Tutorials

    Generic ZSH

  • A Beautifully Productive Terminal Experience - Tutorial using a combination of iTerm 2, ZSH, Preztostars12.1k, Tmux, and Tmuxinatorstars10.7k to make for an extremely productive developer workflow.

    • Tutorials

    Antigen

  • Oh-my-zsh is the Disease and Antigen is the Vaccine - Josh Davis' introduction to Antigen.

    • Tutorials

    Prezto

  • A Beautifully Productive Terminal Experience - Mike Buss' blog post about using Prezto, Tmux & Tmuxinator.

    • Completions

  • dropboxstars20 - A dropbox plugin for Zsh that provides dropbox-cli and dropbox-uploader commands.
  • surfstars2 - Add completions for surf.
  • tugboatstars4 - Adds autocompletion for tugboatstars1.5k command.

    • Themes

  • aplosstars3 - Minimal ZSH prompt with working directory, git local info, git remote info, time and exit code.
  • bgnosterstars0 - Agnoster variant with unicode symbols baked in.
  • bluehighstars2 - Minimal theme, displays git information.
  • bullet-trainstars2.6k - Inspired by the Powerline Vim plugin. It aims for simplicity, showing information only when it's relevant.
  • candy-lightstars1 - Light version of the candy theme.
  • chistars6 - A ZSH theme optimized for iTerm 2 users on macOS.
  • claritystars6 - Designed for for simpleness and extensibility.
  • eubwstars0 - A simple theme with git information.
  • feder - Clean, simple, compatible and meaningful. Tested on Linux, Unix and Windows under ANSI colors.
  • josestars4 - Inspired by beer-themestars1, includes git status.
  • materialshellstars755 - A material design theme for your shell with a good contrast and color pops at the important parts. Designed to be easy on the eyes.
  • mixedstars0 - Optimized for dark backgrounds.
  • multi-shell-repo-promptstars11 - Provides useful information (in your prompt) about the repository that you are in. It currently works for Git and Mercurial, under ZSH as well as bash.
  • powerline-cutestars28 - Based on bullet-trainstars2.6k.
  • powerline-shell (banga)stars5.6k - A powerlinestars2.9k-like prompt for Bash, ZSH and Fish. Shows important details about git/svn/hg/fossil branch and is easy to customize/extend.
  • punctualstars42 - Easily customizable, influenced by spaceshipstars14.4k.
  • zsh2000stars68 - Powerline looking ZSH theme which includes the rvm prompt, git status and branch, current time, user, hostname, pwd, exit status, whether running as root and background job status.

    • Fonts

  • Hack - Another Powerline-compatible font designed specifically for source code.
  • Monoid - Monoid is customizable and optimized for coding with bitmap-like sharpness at 15px line-height even on low res displays.

    • Other Resources

    ZSH Tools

  • zunitstars140 - A powerful unit testing framework for ZSH

  • fortuitystars2 - Includes status of last command, git information and current directory.
  • gawainestars3 - Nicola Racco's theme. Requires rvm & git plugins.
  • girazzstars0 - A modification to the gnzh theme which adds vi mode to the right prompt.
  • gitsomestars56 - Super simple prompt with git info, optimized for the Flat Terminalstars617 color scheme.
  • glimmerstars1 - Includes git branch, time and user@host.
  • hackersaurusstars10 - A theme with git status and exit code of last command run embedded in the prompt. Related to powerlevel9kstars13.1k.
  • haribostars7 - Simple git status + timestamp in prompt.
  • hedgehog - Simple, no-nonsense and clean, with support for git and return codes.
  • iggystars12 - A super happy awesome Powerline-style, git-aware prezto only theme.
  • igorsilvastars9 - Shows current directory, customizable delimiter, current branch, git status.
  • impstars18 - Based on zork and optimized for dark backgrounds.
  • infolinestars4 - Clean theme that shows git status, background jobs, remote host, and other information.
  • jovialstars127 - Shows host, user, path, development environment, git branch, which python venv is active.
  • kketchamstars0 - Theme with nifty colors on the git info.
  • lambda-gitsterstars75 - Minimalist prompt that includes git information.
  • leafiastars1 - Leafy prezto theme that shows git status information.
  • lewisstars0 - Black, white and red theme. Shows git status information.
  • milightstars0 - Minimal ZSH prompt with git status display, works best with dark terminal backgrounds.
  • nmaxcomstars2 - Minimalist ZSH theme with git status decorations.
  • odinstars73 - Odin is a git-flavored ZSH theme.
  • oxide - A Minimalistic and Dark ZSH theme.
  • plainstars0 - A plain and simple theme for ZSH which shows basic git information.
  • poor-programmerstars0 - Programmer's theme with git status, ruby version and project path.
  • powerline-trainstars4 - A powerline variant.
  • powerzeeshstars0 - A Powerline based ZSH theme. It aims for simplicity, showing information only when it's relevant, optimized for speed and look. Inspired by Agnosterstars3.1k and Powerlinestars1.1k.
  • sepshellstars15 - Clean and minimal ZSH theme based on the old lost taybalt theme, with git bisecting/merging/rebasing modes and configurable prompt symbols.
  • sleeplessmindstars0 - ZSH theme inspired by gitster and odinstars73.
  • theme-linestars10 - Colorful theme with git status.
  • topanstars1 - Includes git information; best on dark backgrounds.
  • tqstars1 - Displays git status, time, requires a Powerline font.
  • ultimatestars10 - Minimalist theme with git indicator, vim mode indicator and shortened path.
  • vananstars0 - Minimalist theme with git information for dark terminals.
  • ysmstars1 - Simple ZSH theme with git status information.
  • zetastars187 - Shows username, git status information, machine name and the current working directory.
  • kentonstars2 - Optimized for dark backgrounds, includes git status information.
  • keloranstars0 - Theme that includes a few features from other themes.

item.title: unixorn/awesome-zsh-plugins Oct 7th, 2018
item.description:
Plugins

  • asyncstars540 - Library for running asynchronous tasks in ZSH without requiring any external tools. Allows you to run multiple asynchronous jobs, enforce unique jobs (multiple instances of the same job will not run), flush all currently running jobs and create multiple workers (each with their own jobs).
  • gitsyncstars3 - ZSH plugin to improve workflows for one person developing on the same repository on multiple machines.
  • saneoptstars13 - Sane defaults for ZSH options, in the spirit of vim-sensible.
  • url-highlighterstars27 - A plugin for the ZSH syntax highlighter that turns URLs green if they respond with a "good" status, and red otherwise. Useful for checking URL typos.

    • Completions

  • _url-httplinkstars3 - Extends ZSH's _urls completion, allowing it to complete urls from html pages.

    • Themes

  • cordialstars17 - Clean and effective ZSH theme with git and npm support.
  • rafikistars50 - Adds emojis to your ZSH terminal.

item.title: unixorn/awesome-zsh-plugins Sep 1st, 2018
item.description:
Plugins

  • visitstars1 - Custom plugin for faster navigation.
  • nstars4 - Auto-switches node versions based on project environment using nstars14.5k.

    • Frameworks

    zplug

  • Can manage everything
    • Zsh plugins/UNIX commands on GitHub and Bitbucket
    • Gist files (gist.github.com)
    • Externally managed plugins e.g., oh-my-zshstars127.5k and preztostars12.1k plugins/themes
    • Binary artifacts on GitHub Releases
    • Local plugins
    • etc. (you can add your own sources!)
  • Super-fast parallel installation/update
  • Support for lazy-loading
  • Branch/tag/commit support
  • Post-update, post-load hooks
  • Dependencies between packages
  • Unlike antigenstars6.5k, no ZSH plugin file (*.plugin.zsh) required
  • Interactive interface (fzfstars36.6k, pecostars6.3k, zawstars498, and so on)
  • Cache mechanism for reducing the startup timestars4.6k

item.title: unixorn/awesome-zsh-plugins Oct 28th, 2017
item.description:
Plugins

  • autosuggestionsstars17.2k - Fish-like fast/unobtrusive autosuggestions for ZSH.
  • basexstars2 - Adds several BaseX aliases for simplified usage.
  • bdstars339 - Jump back to a specific directory, without doing cd ../../...
  • cmd-architectstars81 - Build commands from what's in history and at prompt, move, delete, add command segments and search history with multi-word queries.
  • dircyclestars17 - Cycle through the directory stack.
  • editing-workbenchstars39 - Adds sane, complex command line editing (e.g. incremental history word completion).
  • emojisstars9 - Adds numerous ascii art emojis to your environment in convenient variables.
  • favorite-directoriesstars7 - Fast jumps to your favorite directories.
  • functionalstars119 - ZSH higher order functions.
  • fuzzy-search-and-editstars26 - ZSH plugin for fuzzy searching files and instantly opening a matched file on matched line.
  • hintsstars47 - Display glob and parameter flags and other non completable info right under your editing buffer.
  • historystars79 - Extend history so that it can be queried by SQL.
  • interactive-cdstars226 - Fish-like interactive tab completion for cd.
  • iterm-touchbarstars641 - Display iTerm2 feedback in the MacbookPro TouchBar (Current directory, git branch & status).
  • konsole-theme-changerstars1 - Toggle konsole theme from ZSH.
  • manydots-magicstars36 - A zle tweak for emulating ...'==../..' etc.
  • maven-pluginstars0 - A fork of the oh-my-zsh maven plugin.
  • mercurialstars3 - Extracted from oh-my-zsh so you can use it without oh-my-zsh.
  • morphostars20 - Terminal screen savers written in pure ZSH, and also screen saver framework.
  • navigation-toolsstars257 - Adds htop-like kill, directory bookmarks browser, multi-word incremental history searcher and more.
  • open-prstars63 - A ZSH plugin to open pull requests from command line.
  • opt-pathstars9 - Automatically add ~/opt subpaths to your $PATH.
  • osxstars14 - Add some common macOS related aliases and functions.
  • plugin-railsstars2 - ZSH plugin for Rails.
  • plugin-vscodestars16 - Plugin for Visual Studio Code, a text editor for macOS, Windows, and Linux.
  • reentry-hookstars5 - Plugin that re-enters working directory if it has been removed and re-created.
  • selectstars11 - Multi-term searched selection list with approximate matching and uniq mode.
  • suffix-aliasstars1 - Directly open files in the shell using ZSH's suffix aliases.
  • syntax-highlighting-filetypesstars132 - ZSH syntax highlighting with dircolors in realtime.
  • syntax-highlightingstars11.8k - Add syntax highlighting to your ZSH. Make sure you load this before zsh-users/zsh-history-substring-search or they will both break.
  • t32stars2 - Plugin for the Lauterbach Trace32 toolset. It automatically registers fonts and sets all necessary environment variables to run the t32 toolset.
  • travisstars4 - Opens the Travis CI page for the current repo if one exists.

item.description:
Themes

  • darkblood-modularstars1 - This version of the popular darkblood theme has been enhanced with a near complete rewrite enabling modularity and a few new features.

item.title: unixorn/awesome-zsh-plugins Oct 7th, 2014
item.description:
Installation

dotzsh

  • Load the plugin module in .zshrc

    • Installation

    Oh-My-Zsh

  • cd ~/.oh-my-zsh/custom/plugins
  • git clone repo

    • Installation

    Prezto

  • Clone the plugin into your prezto modules directory
  • Add the plugin to your .zpreztorc file
  • Open a new terminal window or tab
